name: Huuuge, Inc.
summary: Huuuge, Inc. operates as a free-to-play games developer and publisher of digital games on mobile and web platforms. It focuses on social casino, casual, and other genres of games. The company's product portfolio includes Huuuge Casino, Billionaire Casino, Stars Slots, Traffic Puzzle, CBG portfolio, Huuuge Bingo Saga, Rogue Land, Coffee Break Games, Huuuge Publishing, Arrows & Empires, and Luna's Quest Bubble Shooter. It also provides in-app advertising services; publishes mobile game applications; and distributes in-house games. In addition, the company provides Coffee Break Games franchise; games advertisement; and games distribution. It serves customers primarily in the United States, Australia, Germany, France, the United Kingdom, Canada, the Netherlands, Poland, Switzerland, Italy, Taiwan, Austria, Canada, Japan, and South Africa. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
